ss_synapse_dev.png.label: Stat cards — click any number to jump to that category (schemas, objects, columns, etc.)
All Objects tab — searchable, sortable list of every table, view, and proc
Columns tab — find any column name or data type across all schemas at once
Schema sidebar — click any schema name to filter the entire view to that schema
Schema card — click to open tables, DDL, column details, and row counts
